ab: te’o meelʉ yuevaho no peisusu?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: tenokuzo te pio na teko ’ucea yuevaha?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: mi’o ta’payo’ʉ maafo to peisu, te’o meelʉ yuevaho suu?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: mi’o maezo o’te mahafo no peisu!
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: mi’o ta’payo’ʉ mahno peisu, te’o meelʉ yuevaho suu?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: o’ate’o,’amcu osko yooveia ’o osu aueva yuevaha ci peisu.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: te’o peela yuevaha si yʉsʉsu?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: naho, iachia yaa.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: te’o peela yuevaha si tposʉsu?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: o’ucu yuevahneni to yangui.
en: B: I lent it to yangui.

ab: tekon’a yuevahahneni a’o si zitensasu, zou?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車,好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: naho, at’inghi tako yooveineni ho hucma.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: cu mʉchʉ, mi’o o’te mahafo no oyofnga, poan’a yuevaho ta oyofngasu zou?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me one?

ab: moc’o coni ’e oyofnga’u, teto ipoepohʉ oefʉngʉ.
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: eni ’o o’u yuevaha suu ci tposʉ, cu yooveineni suu.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: tako eʉsvʉta a’o na iko ’ucea aiti ci tposʉ.
ch: B:你還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B: You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: te’o yooveineni suu ho homna ’e os’o yuevaha ci peisu?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: ’upena, takola yoovei hociko cula yaa peisu.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It doesn't matter, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: tako yoovei ho homna ’o osula yuevaha ci peisu?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: ta’u yooveineni suu ho hucma.
en: A: I will return it to you tomorrow.

ab: tako yoovei ho homna ’o osula yuevaha ci tposʉ?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: ’a o’ucu eno yooveineni suu ne hucma?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: osi yuevahneni suu to yavai ’e ’oyomzana tmopsʉ eni?
en: A: Did yavai lend you this pen?

ab: zou, o’u yuevaha ta maitan’e.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: osu yuevaha to pasuya ’e ’oyomzana tmopsʉ eni?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Pasuya?

ab: o’as’a, ’a osi phini to ino.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: micu uk’ana siu, uhto paicʉ ho ake’i yuevaho.
en: A: We are out of salt, so let's go borrow some from Paic.

ab: zou, te’o uhne’e ho yuevaho.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: usa ’o yangui ho poa yooveineni ’o osi yuevaha ci peisu.
en: B:Go and ask yangui to return my money.

ab: mo pio na osi yuevaha suu ci peisu?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
